evidence: 7 snake_case tools; use-case-rich docstrings
Descriptions extended (get_entries etc.); median >100 chars with use-case context
check_terms verdict not_found + caveat; documented exact-lookup design
Config via pydantic-settings Settings (settings.py); FastMCP lifespan for shared setup; transport-agnostic tools
No secrets; .env gitignored; unauthenticated API
7 high-level tools (<=12), not 1:1 endpoint maps
check_terms parallelised via asyncio.gather
README documents Tools-only rationale (no stable Resources; no Prompts)
All tools annotated readOnlyHint/destructiveHint/openWorldHint
All mandatory files/dirs; ci.yml+publish.yml+live.yml; single-file tools rationale documented
CHANGELOG Keep-a-Changelog; README MCP Protocol Version documents SDK negotiation; Dependabot
Every response Envelope carries source with attribution + licence caveat
Execution errors -> FastMCP isError; error-path tests in test_server.py
Client + api_status mask upstream/internal detail; logged to stderr; test asserts no leak
structlog JSON to stderr (logging_config.py), per-call context; no stdout writes
No print()/stdout writes in src/; logging pinned to stderr
28 offline respx tests (per-tool + error paths); live marker; CI runs not-live; scheduled live.yml
8 README sections + ASCII diagram + limits; bilingual CONTRIBUTING.md/.de.md
README declares Phase 1; annotations match; transition prerequisites documented
Single-instance decision + re-eval triggers documented in ADR 0002 (accepted risk)
FastMCP lifespan owns the shared httpx client and closes it on shutdown; no per-call client
Pydantic v2 typed returns; shared Envelope; Literal enums
check_terms takes ctx: Context and reports progress; ctx available for long-running tool
SSE app configures CORS exposing Mcp-Session-Id, default-deny explicit origins (__main__._run_sse)
Fixed HTTPS egress host; no user-controlled URL -> no SSRF surface
DNS pinning accepted-risk with rationale + triggers in ADR 0001 (single trusted host)
Default transport stdio; SSE only via env; no TCP port on default start
Hardened non-root Dockerfile (USER 10001); k8s securityContext deferred until k8s deployment (not deployed)
No install hooks; transparent install; PyPI OIDC Trusted Publishing
No auth model, no user sessions to bind (ADR 0002 posture; mirrors fedlex ADR 0002)
No API keys/credentials (unauthenticated public API)
Default HOST 127.0.0.1; 0.0.0.0 explicit opt-in with stderr warning (_warn_on_public_binding)
Tool-arg bounds: max_results 1-100, string/list length limits; schema-bounds test
Read-only, public data, no send/write -> at most one trifecta leg; SECURITY.md
No os.system/subprocess/eval/exec anywhere in src/
frozenset ALLOWED_HOSTS + assert_host_allowed before each request; docs/network-egress.md; egress tests
